title: betula recurvata
intro: Betula recurvata, also known as the curved birch or recurved birch, is a species of birch tree native to China. The bark and leaves of Betula recurvata have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Betula recurvata include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Betula recurvata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine remedies like ointments and poultices.
